title: euphorbia dioscoreoides subsp. dioscoreoides
intro: Euphorbia dioscoreoides subsp. dioscoreoides, also known as African wild potato or potato bush, is a succulent plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Euphorbia dioscoreoides subsp. dioscoreoides include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as the relief of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
